title: SerializationObjectDeprecated assertion error
description:
### Describe the bug
Got this on the side while on call. The stack trace is confusing. SerializationObjectDeprecated code should be removed soon, right?
### How to reproduce
Here is my [users.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23375664/users.txt) for users.xml.
On a debug build run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Dynamic) ENGINE = File(JSON);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES ('a');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT map(number::Int,'2028-08-17', number::Int,'2002-01-09') FROM numbers(1);
SELECT 1 FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 = '2000-01-01';
/*
src/DataTypes/Serializations/SerializationObjectDeprecated.cpp:79: void DB::SerializationObjectDeprecated<DB::JSONDataParser<DB::SimdJSONParser>>::deserializeTextImpl(IColumn &, Reader &&) const [Parser = DB::JSONDataParser<DB::SimdJSONParser>, Reader = (lambda at /home/ubuntu/actions-runner/_work/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/src/DataTypes/Serializations/SerializationObjectDeprecated.cpp:120:33)]:
Assertion `subcolumn.size() == old_column_size' failed
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
src/DataTypes/Serializations/SerializationObjectDeprecated.cpp:79: void DB::SerializationObjectDeprecated<DB::JSONDataParser<DB::SimdJSONParser>>::deserializeTextImpl(IColumn &, Reader &&) const [Parser = DB::JSONDataParser<DB::SimdJSONParser>, Reader = (lambda at src/DataTypes/Serializations/SerializationObjectDeprecated.cpp:120:33)]: Assertion `subcolumn.size() == old_column_size' failed.

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Alice', '2023-10-01 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, created_at) SELECT number, concat('User_', number), current_timestamp FROM generate_series(0, 4) AS number;
CREATE TABLE t2 (data VARCHAR, value DOUBLE);
key_bug_features: Assertion failure in SerializationObjectDeprecated during deserialization
